root.sql:
SELECT tab.* FROM ( select sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.membership_no , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.membership_no) as member_name , sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.bank_acc_no , PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_form_depno(sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.bank_acc_no) as format_bank_acc_no
, ( select sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code from sc_dep_m_creditor , sc_dep_m_rule where 1=1 and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code and deposit_account_no = sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.bank_acc_no ) as deposit_type_code
, ( select sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name from sc_dep_m_creditor , sc_dep_m_rule where 1=1 and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code and deposit_account_no = sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.bank_acc_no ) as deposit_name
, ( select PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_thaidate(sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_closing_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') from sc_dep_m_creditor , sc_dep_m_rule where 1=1 and sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code and deposit_account_no = sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.bank_acc_no ) as deposit_closing_date_tdate
, sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.paid_loan , sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.paid_dividen , sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.share_withdraw , sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.atm_lon , sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.atm_dep , sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.paid_agent , sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.paid_salary
from sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno , sc_mem_m_membership_registered
where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_member_bank_accno.bank_acc_no in ( select deposit_account_no from sc_dep_m_creditor where 1=1 and close_status = 'C' ) /*WHERE*/
) TAB
ORDER BY tab.membership_no , tab.deposit_type_code asc
